title: Ossaea angustifolia
taxonomy: Ossaea angustifolia belongs to the family Melastomataceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. This family is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Ossaea angustifolia is a part of the tribe Ossaeinae within the Melastomataceae family. The exact classification of Ossaea angustifolia is further divided into the genus Ossaea and its species angustifolia. The plant's classification is based on its unique characteristics, including its leaf shape and flower structure.
